# Playwright Selector Guard MCP

Paid remote MCP for Playwright selector risk checks, healing suggestions, action receipts, human approvals, and failure exports.

Website: https://playwrightselectorguard.clauxel.com/
MCP endpoint: https://playwrightselectorguard.clauxel.com/mcp
Server card: https://playwrightselectorguard.clauxel.com/server-card.json
Docs: https://github.com/clauxel/playwright-selector-guard-mcp

Use case: Detect brittle Playwright selectors and route safe healing suggestions.
Authentication: Bearer token required for production use.
Tools: check_selector_risk, suggest_selector_healing, record_action_receipt, request_human_approval, export_selector_failure
